ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foia_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FOIA request */,
  "case_no" TEXT /* Case number assigned to the request */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the requester */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the requester */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the requester */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the request was received */,
  "date_due_out" TEXT /* Date the request is due to be completed */,
  "track" TEXT /* Track of the request (e.g., Fast, Standard) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Detailed subject of the request */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date the request was closed */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requester (foreign key to requesters table) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "requester_type" TEXT /* Type of the requester (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foia_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requesters" (
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requester */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the requester */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the requester */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the requester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the requester */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the requester */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the requester */,
  "requester_type" TEXT /* Type of the requester (e.g., Individual, Organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the requester's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the requester's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number assigned to the entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity holding the license */,
  "entity_address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the license will expire */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the license (e.g., Breeder, Research) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Breeder, Researcher, Zoo) */,
  "license_status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., Active, Expired, Suspended) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Next renewal date of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_results" TEXT /* Results of the inspection (e.g., Compliance, Non-Compliance) */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "inspection_findings" TEXT /* Detailed findings from the inspection */,
  "inspection_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the inspection findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspector_details ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspector_details" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "inspector_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspector's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inspector's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FOIA request the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Investigation Report, License, Study) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence" (
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correspondence */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FOIA request the correspondence is related to */,
  "correspondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correspondent (e.g., requester, agency staff) */,
  "correspondence_date" TEXT /* Date of the correspondence */,
  "correspondence_type" TEXT /* Type of correspondence (e.g., Email, Letter) */,
  "correspondence_content" TEXT /* Content of the correspondence */,
  "correspondence_status" TEXT /* Status of the correspondence (e.g., Sent, Received, Pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_correspondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondent_id") REFERENCES correspondents ("correspondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondents" (
  "correspondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correspondent */,
  "correspondent_name" TEXT /* Name of the correspondent */,
  "correspondent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the correspondent */,
  "correspondent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the correspondent */,
  "correspondent_type" TEXT /* Type of the correspondent (e.g., Requester, Agency Staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondent's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondent's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FOIA request being accessed */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the request or document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Download) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., Requester, Agency Staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES foia_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)
